untranslatable_reason: BARR trend line, double top pattern detection, parallel sell line construction, and lead-in height calculations require geometric pattern recognition that cannot be expressed using the allowed indicators. The signal requires: (1) identification of a double top formation, (2) confirmation against a BARR trend line, (3) calculation of trend line slope and lead-in height, (4) construction of parallel sell line at distance equal to lead-in height. These are chart-pattern properties that need candlestick sequence analysis and trend line fitting, which are not available in the provided indicator set.
translation_notes: Provided a simplified SHORT entry based on price decline (close < prev_close) as a proxy, but this does not capture the specific BARR pattern requirements. Exit condition uses a reversal signal (close > prev_high). Actual implementation requires custom pattern recognition functions for double top detection and trend line calculations. Author-silent parameters (success rates, decline percentages, stop placement rules, target prices) cannot be translated and must be sourced from original Bulkowski research or backtesting.
